step_name: Browser: Verify Settings tab — member sees Leave
instruction:
On Settings tab as NON-LEADER, verify: 1. "Leave Team" button visible — NOT "Dissolve Team" 2. Click "Leave Team" — confirmation shows:
   - 'Leave team "page-test"? This will stop syncing...'
   - "Leave" button + "Cancel" button
3. Click "Cancel" — dismisses DO NOT actually leave. Take a screenshot.

expect.description: Non-leader sees Leave (not Dissolve), confirmation works
